mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COST_CENTER_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}
DELETE FROM ASSET_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}
DELETE FROM LOAN_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}
DELETE FROM CASHFLOW_PLAN_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}
DELETE FROM MANUAL_CASHFLOW_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COST_CENTER_HST (FAMILY_ID, HST_YYMM, CC_SEQ, CC_NM, CC_TYPE, INCOME_PLAN_NM, INCOME_AMT, EXPENSE_AMT, BALANCE) SELECT c.FAMILY_ID, #{yymm}, c.CC_SEQ, c.CC_NM, c.CC_TYPE, ip.PLAN_NM, COALESCE(ip.AMOUNT, 0), COALESCE(SUM(ep.AMOUNT), 0), COALESCE(ip.AMOUNT, 0) - COALESCE(SUM(ep.AMOUNT), 0) FROM COST_CENTER_MST c LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST ip ON ip.PLAN_SEQ = c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ AND ip.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST ep ON ep.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ep.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( (ep.COST_CENTER_TYPE = 'CC' AND ep.COST_CENTER_SEQ = c.CC_SEQ) OR (c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ IS NOT NULL AND ep.PLAN_SEQ = c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ) ) WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY c.CC_SEQ, c.CC_NM, c.CC_TYPE, c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, ip.PLAN_NM, ip.AMOUNT

INSERT INTO ASSET_HST (FAMILY_ID, HST_YYMM, ASSET_SEQ, ASSET_NM, ASSET_TYPE, ASSET_TYPE_NM, LIQUID_YN, AMOUNT) SELECT a.FAMILY_ID, #{yymm}, a.ASSET_SEQ, a.ASSET_NM, a.ASSET_TYPE, t.ASSET_TYPE_NM, a.LIQUID_YN, a.AMOUNT FROM ASSET_MST a LEFT JOIN ASSET_TYPE_CD t ON t.ASSET_TYPE = a.ASSET_TYPE WHERE a.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND a.DEL_YN = 'N' AND a.DISPOSE_YN = 'N'

INSERT INTO LOAN_HST (FAMILY_ID, HST_YYMM, LOAN_SEQ, LOAN_NM, LOAN_AMOUNT, CURRENT_BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE) SELECT FAMILY_ID, #{yymm}, LOAN_SEQ, LOAN_NM, LOAN_AMOUNT, CURRENT_BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE FROM LOAN_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND CLOSE_YN = 'N'

INSERT INTO CASHFLOW_PLAN_HST (FAMILY_ID, HST_YYMM, PLAN_SEQ, PLAN_NM, FLOW_TYPE, PLAN_TYPE_NM, AMOUNT, USE_YN) SELECT p.FAMILY_ID, #{yymm}, p.PLAN_SEQ, p.PLAN_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE, t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.AMOUNT, p.USE_YN FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON t.PLAN_TYPE = p.PLAN_TYPE WHERE p.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND p.DEL_YN = 'N'

INSERT INTO MANUAL_CASHFLOW_HST (FAMILY_ID, HST_YYMM, CF_SEQ, CC_SEQ, CC_NM, FLOW_TYPE, FLOW_YYMM, TITLE, ACTUAL_AMT, MEMO, REG_DT) SELECT c.FAMILY_ID, #{yymm}, c.CF_SEQ, c.CC_SEQ, cc.CC_NM, c.FLOW_TYPE, c.FLOW_YYMM, c.TITLE, c.ACTUAL_AMT, c.MEMO, NOW() FROM MANUAL_CASHFLOW_MST c JOIN COST_CENTER_MST cc ON cc.CC_SEQ = c.CC_SEQ WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.FLOW_YYMM = #{yymm}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COST_CENTER_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND HST_YYMM = #{yymm}

SELECT a.HST_YYMM, COALESCE(a.TOTAL_ASSET_AMT, 0) AS TOTAL_ASSET_AMT, COALESCE(a.LIQUID_ASSET_AMT, 0) AS LIQUID_ASSET_AMT, COALESCE(a.FIXED_ASSET_AMT, 0) AS FIXED_ASSET_AMT, COALESCE(l.TOTAL_LOAN_BALANCE, 0) AS TOTAL_LOAN_BALANCE, COALESCE(a.TOTAL_ASSET_AMT, 0) - COALESCE(l.TOTAL_LOAN_BALANCE, 0) AS NET_ASSET_AMT, COALESCE(cf.MONTHLY_INCOME, 0) AS MONTHLY_INCOME, COALESCE(cf.MONTHLY_EXPENSE, 0) AS MONTHLY_EXPENSE FROM ( SELECT HST_YYMM, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_ASSET_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN LIQUID_YN = 'Y' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS LIQUID_ASSET_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN LIQUID_YN = 'N' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS FIXED_ASSET_AMT FROM ASSET_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} GROUP BY HST_YYMM ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HST_YYMM, SUM(CURRENT_BALANCE) AS TOTAL_LOAN_BALANCE FROM LOAN_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} GROUP BY HST_YYMM ) l ON a.HST_YYMM = l.HST_YYMM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HST_YYMM, SUM(CASE WHEN FLOW_TYPE = 'INCOME' AND USE_YN = 'Y' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS MONTHLY_INCOME, SUM(CASE WHEN FLOW_TYPE IN ('EXPENSE','SAVING','INVEST') AND USE_YN = 'Y' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS MONTHLY_EXPENSE FROM CASHFLOW_PLAN_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} GROUP BY HST_YYMM ) cf ON a.HST_YYMM = cf.HST_YYMM ORDER BY a.HST_YYMM

SELECT HST_YYMM, ASSET_TYPE, COALESCE(ASSET_TYPE_NM, ASSET_TYPE) AS ASSET_TYPE_NM, SUM(AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM ASSET_HST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} GROUP BY HST_YYMM, ASSET_TYPE, ASSET_TYPE_NM ORDER BY HST_YYMM, ASSET_TYPE

SELECT DISTINCT FAMILY_ID FROM COST_CENTER_MST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' UNION SELECT DISTINCT FAMILY_ID FROM ASSET_MST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' UNION SELECT DISTINCT FAMILY_ID FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
